first a domain name reserver then a

and the situation is getting worse
everything moving to a cloud but the

this move creates much much more

makes sense because this way it's easier

service operators they don't have to

blood didn't send an internal email to

have this

that makes her internet more fragile the
decentralized people-to-people web solve

points the web hosting services it
empowers the users to have Haas sites

the site got down on the directly from
other visitors this means if you have a

basically this is a people powered

owner think of it like instead of
getting activity from big power plants
you put solar panel on top of your hubs
and if your neighbor down the street

using the decentralized web we can have
to keep content accessible for other

can also fight against things that you

Internet is tightly controlled they can

but at the same time it's hard to use

kind of periodic content another
increasing threat to Internet freedom is

blogging criticizing discussing linking

our of course they can't process the

Wide Web
Vint Cerf and timbres Lee but despite

regulations would be very hard to

officially made me the enemy of their
government
supported internet censorship since then
it's been really game of cat and mouse
